title: Add eat/consume action for hunger management
description:
**Source:** External audit (capability gap) | **Council:** Deferred post-Sprint 56

**Problem:** The adapter tracks `food` in status events but has no action to eat when hungry. For any long-running building/mining session in survival mode, hunger depletes and the bot needs to eat to regenerate health and continue working.

**Fix:** Add a new `consume` action case in the dispatch switch that:
1. Finds food items in inventory (bread, steak, cooked porkchop, etc.)
2. Equips the food item
3. Calls `bot.consume()` (available in mineflayer)
4. Reports success/failure via `consumeComplete` event

**Files:** `MineflayerAdapter/index.js` (new case in dispatch switch)

**Priority:** Low — survival mode only. Creative mode doesn't need eating.
